vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc, ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: I spent a good hour just marveling at the sheer scale of the oil paintings on display.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, quan sát kỹ để cảm thụ
vocab.example: An art gallery is a place where you should slow down to truly take in every detail of the exhibits.

vocab.meaning: suy ngẫm về (ý nghĩa hoặc thông điệp)
vocab.example: The abstract installation forced me to reflect on the relationship between nature and technology.

vocab.meaning: thong dong đi dạo qua (một không gian)
vocab.example: I love to drift through the quiet corridors of a gallery on a weekday afternoon to escape the city noise.

vocab.meaning: ngập tràn trong, chìm đắm trong (lịch sử, nghệ thuật)
vocab.example: The national gallery is steeped in history, housing masterpieces that span several centuries.

vocab.meaning: lùi lại một khoảng (để có cái nhìn tổng thể)
vocab.example: Sometimes you need to stand back from a contemporary piece to grasp its full visual impact.

vocab.meaning: gợi nhớ về điều gì đó
vocab.example: The somber colors used in the portrait called mind to the hardships of the post-war era.

vocab.meaning: ghé qua, đi ngang qua (một khu vực triển lãm)
vocab.example: I happened to pass through the temporary exhibition wing and was pleasantly surprised by the local talent.
In a small corner of the gallery, I came across a collection of sketches that were incredibly intimate.

vocab.meaning: mở lòng, đón nhận (trải nghiệm hoặc cảm xúc mới)
vocab.example: Visiting an art gallery helped me open up to unconventional forms of expression that I previously ignored.
